description: Style NoteThese globalite StarTech shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Product DetailsBlack mesh upper with synthetic overlays, central lace-ups and green trimsMesh inner and tongueThick midsole grooved at the peripheryThick rubber outsole with scooped heel and waffle pattern lugs  Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
